system.powerDescription:
You cover a surface up to CAT area in size in a vile concoction. Pick one of the following sets of traits to apply to your wretched alchemy. 

• TAR: Incredibly sticky. Renders movement difficult if not outright impossible through the patch. 
• BILE: Incredibly acidic. Does not eat into flesh nor the surface it is spread upon, will rapidly destroy any other inorganic matter that contacts it. 
• TOXIN: Incredibly painful. Does not cause any physical damage, but contact with flesh (even through clothing) results in an agonizing sting. 

Gain or grant +1D when you or an ally next take advantage of this effect. This effect may easily alter parameters whilst active.
